subject: [PATCH v4 13/21] swap: manage swap entry lifecycle at the virtual swap layer

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch moves the management of swap entry lifecycle to the virtual swap layer, introducing two new fields in the swap descriptor: 'in_swapcache' and 'swap_count'. The existing swap entry lifecycle API is re-implemented in the virtual swap layer. This change simplifies the logic by not implementing swap count continuation for now.
